title: General opener
text: That makes sense — what matters most to you here?

title: Clarify confusion
text: Let me clarify the part that usually causes confusion.

title: Offer walkthrough
text: Would it help if I walk through the options briefly?

title: Price objection
text: I understand — what are you comparing it against right now?

title: Need to think
text: Of course — what information would help you decide with confidence?
